steps.title: Two language settings on AhaSlides
steps.description: AhaSlides gives you two separate language controls: the presenter interface language (your menus and buttons), and the audience display language (what participants see). Let's set both.

steps.title: Presenter interface language — 27 options
steps.description: Click the globe icon to open the presenter language menu. Choose from 27 languages: Čeština, Deutsch, English, Español, Français, Hrvatski, Italiano, Polski, Português, Tiếng Việt, 中文, 日本語 and more. The interface switches instantly.

action.hint: Click the globe icon to open the language menu

steps.title: Presenter language selected instantly
steps.description: The dropdown lists all 27 interface languages — scroll to find yours and the AhaSlides presenter interface updates immediately, no page reload needed.

steps.title: Now set the audience language
steps.description: The audience display language is found inside any presentation's Settings — it is per-presentation, so different presentations can target different audiences. Click 'New presentation' to open the editor.

steps.title: Start with a Poll slide
steps.description: Every presentation can have its own display language for the audience. Click 'Poll' to add a slide — then we'll head straight to the language settings.

action.hint: Click Poll to add a slide

steps.title: Slide added — heading to Settings
steps.description: The Poll slide is in your deck. Now let's open Settings to choose the audience display language.

steps.title: Open the presentation Settings
steps.description: Click the Settings icon on the right-hand panel. This controls how the presentation behaves for your audience.

action.hint: Click Settings to open the settings panel

steps.title: Settings panel is loading
steps.description: The Settings panel is opening — here you control how this presentation behaves for your audience, from joining rules to language.

steps.title: Go to Presentation language
steps.description: The Settings panel is open. Click 'Presentation language' in the left menu to reach the audience language dropdown.

action.hint: Click Presentation language in the menu

steps.title: Audience display language — 32 options
steps.description: This dropdown controls what language participants see on their devices. AhaSlides supports 32 audience languages including Bahasa Indonesia, Deutsch, English, Español, Français, Polski, Português, Tiếng Việt, Türkçe, 中文, 日本語 and more.

steps.title: Choosing Español for our audience
steps.description: Let's select Spanish — Español — for this presentation. Once selected, all participant-facing text switches to Spanish: questions, answer options, the join screen, and navigation.

steps.title: Español set — close Settings
steps.description: The audience language is saved to Español automatically. Click the X to close Settings and return to the editor.

action.hint: Click X to close the Settings modal

steps.title: Preview — see the audience view in Spanish
steps.description: Click Preview to see exactly what Spanish-speaking participants will see — the entire audience interface now appears in Español.

steps.title: Audience view in Español
steps.description: Your audience sees AhaSlides in Spanish — the join screen, buttons, and instructions all appear in Español on participants' devices.

steps.title: All set!
steps.description: Both language settings are saved automatically. Combine the presenter interface language with the audience display language to run fully multilingual sessions. Click Present when you're ready to go live.
